name: block
description: Anchored data-display actor. A $block bridges woo to an outside-world data source: an external plug authenticates as the block's actor (apikey-bound) and pushes property values into the block's writable_self surface; the block's owner sets configuration via writable_owner. Subclass for concrete data shapes (weather, ticker, dispenser).

classes.description: Base class for plug-driven data display. Anchored: a block stays at its placement and rejects becoming a container. Property writes are tier-gated: writable_owner is settable by the block's owner (config), writable_self is settable by the block's actor (the plug, authenticated via apikey). Wizard always bypasses. Property writes emit a live block_data observation to the containing space; the substrate does not log block_data, so reconnecting clients re-read current values via :get_data.

verbs.name: set_property
verbs.source: verb :set_property(name, value) rx { if (typeof(name) != "string" || !name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_property requires a non-empty name", value: name }; } let ok = false; if (has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { ok = true; } else if (actor == this && name in this.writable_self) { ok = true; } else if (actor == this.owner && name in this.writable_owner) { ok = true; } if (!ok) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "property is not writable by this actor", value: { property: name, actor: actor } }; } this.(name) = value; let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { observe_to_space(here, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: name, value: value, ts: now() }); } return value; }

verbs.name: set_properties
verbs.source: verb :set_properties(values) rx { if (typeof(values) != "map") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_properties requires a map", value: values }; } let is_wiz = has_flag(actor, "wizard"); let is_self = actor == this; let is_owner = actor == this.owner; let names = keys(values); for n in names { let ok = is_wiz; if (!ok && is_self && n in this.writable_self) { ok = true; } if (!ok && is_owner && n in this.writable_owner) { ok = true; } if (!ok) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "property is not writable by this actor", value: { property: n, actor: actor } }; } } let audience = location(this); let routable = audience != null && isa(audience, $space); let ts = now(); for n in names { let v = values[n]; this.(n) = v; if (routable) { observe_to_space(audience, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: n, value: v, ts: ts }); } } return values; }

verbs.name: get_data
verbs.source: verb :get_data(name) rxd { if (typeof(name) != "string" || !name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "get_data requires a non-empty name", value: name }; } return this.(name); }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let summary = {}; for n in this.summary_props { summary[n] = this.(n); } return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, last_pushed_at: this.last_pushed_at, last_error: this.last_error, summary: summary, location: location(this) }; }

verbs.name: moveto
verbs.source: verb :moveto(target) rx { if (!has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "this block is anchored and cannot be moved", value: this }; } return moveto(this, target); }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { if (has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { return true; } return false; }

verbs.name: list_apikeys
verbs.source: verb :list_apikeys() rxd { let all = $system:list_api_keys_for_owner(); let mine = []; for k in all { if (k["actor"] == this) { mine = mine + [k]; } } return mine; }
